keynotes.text: Text Book of Materia Medica. By Adolph Lippe, M. D. Professor of Materia Medica at the Homopathic College of Pennsylvania. Presented by Médi-T. Thrombidium muscæ domesticæ. Stool and Anus. Griping pain in the abdomen, followed by stool ; first, feces ; later, they are mixed with mucus ; worse after eating ; stool with tenesmus and prolapsus ani, shivering in the back, perspiration. Dysentery. Copyright © Médi-T 2006
